name: Orizon Valorizacao De Residuos S.A.
summary: Orizon Valorizacao De Residuos S.A. provides waste treatment and recovery company. It processes and disposes wastes; and sources and treats gases from the decomposition of waste, for the sale or reuse of methane gas. The company also produces renewable energy from biogas electric power plants. In addition, it offers environmental engineering services, such as confirmatory and detailed investigation; environmental remediation; groundwater, surface water, soil, and effluents monitoring; plant decommissioning planning; degraded areas recovery; and industrial waste management services. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
